title: linaria reflexa f. flava
intro: Linaria reflexa f. flava, also known as the yellow-toothed toadflax, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Linaria reflexa f. flava include its potential to soothe the digestive system, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
